content: iOS Safari quirks: AudioContext must be created/resumed inside the user gesture handler BEFORE getUserMedia, else it stays suspended and no audio plays/visualizes. Remote audio needs playsinline and gesture-triggered play(). AudioContext suspends when page is backgrounded (webkit bug 237878) — sessions die on app switch. Audio may route to earpiece not loudspeaker. Mic capture sample rate quirks; only one active getUserMedia stream. Design flow so the mic-button tap is the gesture that unlocks audio.
